channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Late Van Dijk goal sees Liverpool move to within six points of the Premier League title
item.description: LIVERPOOL, England (AP) — Virgil van Dijk scored a late winner against West Ham on Sunday to move Liverpool to within six points of the Premier League title.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Celtics star Jaylen Brown received injections in right knee, coach Joe Mazzulla says
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Boston Celtics coach Joe Mazzulla on Sunday confirmed a report that Jaylen Brown received injections during the week to help his troublesome right knee that’s limited his playing time the past month. It was first reported by ESPN that Brown received pain management injections.
item.dc:creator: KEN POWTAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tom Brady teases WrestleMania 41 appearance
item.description: Tom Brady, a Las Vegas Raiders' minority owner, talked to Fox News Digital about the possibility of making an appearance at WrestleMania 41 next weekend.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 89th Masters Tournament
item.description: Roars for Rory. The famous sound of Sunday at the Masters Tournament could be for Rory McIlroy (-12) this year.
item.dc:creator: John Hart, WGN 9

item.title: Trump sits cageside at Miami UFC event in his latest appearance at a sports event
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — President Donald Trump said the standing ovation and cheers he drew when he took his seat at a UFC event in his home state of Florida were signs “we're doing a good job.
item.dc:creator: STEPHANY MATAT and DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Cubs have big night in 16-0 rout of Dodgers, handing LA the worst home shutout loss in franchise history
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles Dodgers franchise has been around since 1884, going back to its days in Brooklyn. And no team had ever done to the Dodgers in front of their home crowd what the Cubs did at Dodger Stadium on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: MIKE DIGIOVANNA, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Connor stars as Jets clinch Central Division title with shootout victory over Blackhawks
item.description: Kyle Connor and Cole Perfetti scored in the shootout, and the Winnipeg Jets clinched the franchise’s first Central Division title and the No. 1 seed for the Western Conference playoffs with a wild 5-4 victory over the Chicago Blackhawks on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Fan reaches into Mike Trout's glove to snatch a catch from Angels outfielder
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — A fan grabbed the ball out of Mike Trout's glove after the Los Angeles Angels star reached into the right field stands Saturday night to make what appeared to be a great catch against the Houston Astros.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cowboys' Dak Prescott says he could 'definitely' play 'today' as he recovers from hamstring injury
item.description: Dallas Cowboys quarterback Dak Prescott said that he "definitely" could play right now after he underwent surgery on his hamstring in November.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: San Antonio's Stephon Castle is the rookie of the year favorite, and that has him thinking ahead
item.description: San Antonio guard Stephon Castle went through a little of everything in Year 1 of his NBA career. He's been in and out of the Spurs' starting lineup. He had Gregg Popovich coaching him for only five games. He played most of the season's second half without Victor Wembanyama. It was a roller coaster.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mystery remains over cause of death of former NFL cornerback Vontae Davis
item.description: The cause of death for former NFL star cornerback Vontae Davis is still undetermined more than a year after he died at a Florida home.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Nuggets fire head coach, GM with three games remaining before the playoffs
item.description: The decision comes as the Nuggets only have three regular-season games remaining before the NBA playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Spencer Kristensen, NewsNation

item.title: Salt Lake Bees celebrate first home game at new Daybreak ballpark
item.description: The Bees will welcome the Reno Aces for a six-game homestand starting April 8, which will include giveaways, music, and activities for the whole family.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Egor Demin leaves BYU for NBA Draft
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU standout point guard Egor Demin has decided to leave BYU after one season and declare for the NBA Draft. Demin made the announcement at a press conference held at the school Tuesday morning.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bulls championship banners back up in United Center rafters earlier than expected
item.description: The Chicago Bulls' six championship banners have been rehung at the United Center after being removed due to damage from a rock concert by Disturbed.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Women's NCAA Final Four tournament a 'slam dunk for Tampa's economy
item.description: Even though the women’s championship is over, Tampa businesses are calling this weekend a "slam dunk." This is the fourth time the city has hosted the NCAA women’s basketball Final Four, and it’s not just basketball fans who are winning.
item.dc:creator: Georgia McCarthur, WFLA, NBC

item.title: UConn dominates South Carolina in women's national championship
item.description: A huge win for the UConn Huskies Sunday as the team dominated the South Carolina Gamecocks and made history inside Amalie Arena.
item.dc:creator: Marilyn Parker, WFLA, NBC
